resume_text: Recent MBA graduate with internship experience coordinating cross-functional sprints for a 12-person fintech startup. Managed backlog grooming, sprint planning, and stakeholder updates. Certified Scrum Master (CSM). Led a capstone project delivering a customer-facing dashboard six days ahead of schedule. Strong communicator with early-stage ownership across product, design, and QA tracks.

resume_text: 2.5 years managing software delivery for a B2B SaaS company. Led end-to-end delivery of three product releases, each involving 8–15 engineers, designers, and QA. Implemented OKR tracking that improved quarterly goal visibility. Coordinated vendor integrations and managed a $400K project budget. PMP-certified. Comfortable running post-mortems and translating technical debt into business risk for leadership.
project_signals: Delivered 3 product releases on time with teams of 8–15 people
Managed a $400K project budget with <2% variance
Coordinated two third-party API integrations across separate vendor timelines
impact_signals: OKR adoption led to 30% improvement in on-time delivery across the org
Release cycle time reduced from 6 weeks to 4 weeks
Post-mortem process cut repeat incidents by 55%
ownership_signals: Owned the project charter, RACI matrix, and release calendar without a PMO
Escalated and resolved a critical vendor delay that would have pushed the release by 3 weeks

resume_text: 7 years of project management across e-commerce and enterprise SaaS. Led a platform re-architecture program involving 4 squads and 32 engineers over 18 months. Reduced time-to-market by 25% through process standardization.

Mentored 4 junior PMs — all promoted within 18 months

resume_text: Former construction project manager (5 years) transitioned to software delivery. Managed multi-contractor builds valued up to $3M, with strict safety compliance and permit tracking. Took a 12-week PMP bootcamp, earned PMP certification, and joined a mid-sized software firm as project manager 18 months ago. Applies rigorous schedule and risk management from construction to software sprints. Successfully delivered two ERP migration projects.

Primary escalation point for both client and vendor throughout ERP projects
